prompt: Blocker cue: tap right hole card (Ks).
why_v1: Hole-card anchor keeps hand reference stable before range action.
feedback_correct_v1: Correct. Ks is the hole-card anchor here because that blocker strips out strong continues and makes the raise story credible.
feedback_incorrect_v1: Incorrect. Ks is the correct hole-card cue here because that blocker removes strong continues and decides whether the raise can apply real pressure.
